titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 732

p.seg: To all Christ's faithful to whom the present writing shall have come, Walter Oliphant sends greeting in the Lord.

Know all of you that I have confirmed to God, Saint Cuthbert, Saint Ebbe, and to the monks of Durham serving God at Coldingham, the donation which Clarebald of Ashby made to God, Saint Cuthbert, Saint Ebbe, and to the monks of Coldingham serving God in that place, of two fisheries on the Tweed, that is, one fishery below the garden at Fishwick, and the other at Shipswell, as it is comprised in the charter which the said Clarebald gave to the said monks for the said fisheries, which I gave, granted, and by my charter made firm to the said Clarebald and his heirs in return for their homage and service.
And as witness of this confirmation I have applied my seal to the present writing.
